top_signals.title: DNV Launches Hydrogen Fuel Recommended Practice
top_signals.summary: DNV has released a new recommended practice (RP) for hydrogen as ship fuel. It outlines the competence requirements for crew, inspectors, and technical personnel to support the proper handling of hydrogen systems on board ships.Hydrogen is gaining traction as a marine fuel…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
